module_info.docstring:
CLI Archive Commands Tests.

Tests for archive-related CLI subcommands:
- archive save: Create ZIP backup of SQLite and storage
- archive list: Show saved mailbox states
- archive restore: Restore a previously saved state

Reference: mcp_agent_mail-enu

functions.name: strip_ansi
functions.docstring: Remove ANSI escape codes from text for reliable assertion matching.

functions.name: create_test_archive
functions.docstring: Create a minimal test archive file.

functions.name: test_archive_save_creates_zip
functions.docstring: archive save creates a ZIP file with correct preset.

functions.name: test_archive_save_with_label
functions.docstring: archive save accepts --label option.

functions.name: test_archive_save_with_project_filter
functions.docstring: archive save accepts --project filter option.

functions.name: test_archive_save_with_scrub_preset
functions.docstring: archive save accepts --scrub-preset option.

functions.name: test_archive_save_invalid_scrub_preset
functions.docstring: archive save rejects invalid scrub presets.

functions.name: test_archive_save_short_options
functions.docstring: archive save accepts short options -p and -l.

functions.name: test_archive_list_empty_directory
functions.docstring: archive list handles empty archive directory gracefully.

functions.name: test_archive_list_nonexistent_directory
functions.docstring: archive list handles nonexistent archive directory.

functions.name: test_archive_list_shows_archives
functions.docstring: archive list displays available archives.

functions.name: test_archive_list_with_limit
functions.docstring: archive list respects --limit option.

functions.name: test_archive_list_json_output
functions.docstring: archive list supports --json output format.

functions.name: test_archive_list_short_limit_option
functions.docstring: archive list accepts -n short option for limit.

functions.name: test_archive_restore_missing_file
functions.docstring: archive restore fails gracefully with missing file.

functions.name: test_archive_restore_dry_run
functions.docstring: archive restore --dry-run shows planned steps without changes.

functions.name: test_archive_restore_force_option
functions.docstring: archive restore --force skips confirmation prompts.

functions.name: test_archive_restore_invalid_zip
functions.docstring: archive restore handles invalid/corrupt ZIP files.

functions.name: test_archive_restore_by_filename
functions.docstring: archive restore can find archives by filename in default directory.

functions.name: test_archive_save_handles_database_error
functions.docstring: archive save handles database errors gracefully.

functions.name: test_archive_list_handles_corrupt_metadata
functions.docstring: archive list handles archives with corrupt/missing metadata.

functions.name: test_archive_restore_metadata_warning
functions.docstring: archive restore shows warning for missing/invalid metadata.

functions.name: test_archive_commands_help_text
functions.docstring: archive commands show helpful usage information.

functions.name: test_archive_save_help_text
functions.docstring: archive save shows its options in help.

functions.name: test_archive_list_help_text
functions.docstring: archive list shows its options in help.

functions.name: test_archive_restore_help_text
functions.docstring: archive restore shows its options in help.
